rulings.Case Title: DAVID LO et al VS. DANIEL S LEE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of General Demurrers By Daniel S. Lee And Junko Tanaka And Special Demurrers To Causes Of Action One Through Six By Daniel S. Lee And Ospecial Demurrers To Causes Of Action One And Two By Junko Tanaka
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 18, 2014, Line 2: DEFENDANTS DANIEL LEE and JUNKO TANAKA's General Demurrer and Special Demurrers: Sustained with leave to amend to allege each element of each cause of action not merely "on information and belief" but supported by specific facts (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID LO et al VS. DANIEL S LEE et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 18, 2014, Line 2: DEFENDANTS DANIEL LEE and JUNKO TANAKA's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT: GRANTED with leave to amend. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: FERGUS O'SULLIVAN VS. MICHAEL ROUPPET et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Continuance To Vacate Default Judgement C.C.P. Section 1169
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 18, 2014, Line 4: DEFENDANT MICHAEL ROUPPET's Motion For Continuance To Vacate Default Judgement C.C.P. Section 1169: DENIED. There is no Motion to Vacate on calendar in this case. It was ordered off calendar for untimeliness on August 18, 2014. (501/REQ)

rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 18, 2014, Line 5: DEFENDANT JAMES BLOCHO'S Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment: OFF CALENDAR, untimely per CCP 1005. (501/REQ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Vacate Entry Of Default, Default Judgment And To Quash Service Of Summons
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 18, 2014, Line 6: DEFENDANT NAVEEN SINGHA's motion To Vacate Entry Of Default, Default Judgment And To Quash Service Of Summons: GRANTED. Defendant shall be properly served. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LESLIE WAN ET AL VS. RICHARD PADILLA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 18, 2014, Line 7: DEFENDANTS RICHARD PADILLA, WILLIAM CARMICHAEL, JENNIFER EMPERADOR and DONALD BRANCHFLOWER's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT: Overruled. Complaint is not uncertain. Moving defendants are identified as subtenants, albeit next to the "other" box. Defendants do not cite any authority regarding their position as to the sequence of signatures affixed to the Complaint. (501/REQ)
